query:
INSERT INTO products (sku, name, description, categoryId, costPrice, sellingPrice, fobLevel1, fobLevel2, fobLevel3, status, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('SB-001-GRY', 'Modern Convertible Sofa Bed - Gray', 'A modern convertible sofa bed with clean lines, upholstered in light gray fabric, featuring tufted cushions and wooden legs. Perfect for small apartments and guest rooms.', 1, 200.00, 285.00, 285.00, 265.00, 245.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-002-NVY', 'Luxury Velvet Sofa Bed - Navy Blue', 'A luxurious velvet sofa bed in deep navy blue color, with gold metal legs and button-tufted backrest. Modern Scandinavian design that adds elegance to any living space.', 1, 320.00, 425.00, 425.00, 395.00, 365.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-003-BGE', 'Minimalist Linen Sofa Bed - Beige', 'A minimalist sofa bed with beige linen fabric, low profile design, featuring removable armrests and chrome legs. Contemporary style perfect for modern homes.', 1, 240.00, 315.00, 315.00, 295.00, 275.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-004-CHR', 'L-Shaped Sofa Bed with Storage - Charcoal', 'A contemporary L-shaped sofa bed in charcoal gray fabric with chaise lounge, featuring storage compartment and chrome legs. Modern multifunctional design.', 1, 420.00, 565.00, 565.00, 525.00, 485.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-005-TEA', 'Compact Two-Seater Sofa Bed - Teal', 'A compact two-seater sofa bed in teal blue fabric with rounded arms and wooden legs. Scandinavian minimalist design, ideal for small spaces.', 1, 180.00, 245.00, 245.00, 225.00, 205.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW());
